records.question: Which users named Tal Galili, with accountid at most 93886 and no more than 5 downvotes, whose websiteurl is exactly http://www.r-statistics.com and last accessed on 2014-09-02 14:18:16, have votes created on or before 2010-10-08 and comments made since 2010-09-28 21:09:48?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.accountid <= 93886 AND users.downvotes <= 5 AND users.websiteurl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com' AND users.lastaccessdate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16.0' AND votes.creationdate <= '2010-10-08' AND users.displayname = 'Tal Galili' AND comments.creationdate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE accountid <= 93886
  AND downvotes <= 5
  AND websiteurl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com'
  AND lastaccessdate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16.0'
  AND displayname = 'Tal Galili'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM comments
      WHERE comments.userid = users.id
        AND comments.creationdate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48.0'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM votes
      WHERE votes.userid = users.id
        AND votes.creationdate <= '2010-10-08'
  )

records.question: Who are the users with a website URL exactly http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828, created on 2010-07-20 12:52:54.0, last accessed on 2014-09-11 22:19:31.0, and whose posts have a score of exactly 3 and zero comments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posts ON users.id = posts.lasteditoruserid AND users.id = posts.owneruserid
WHERE posts.score = 3 AND users.lastaccessdate = '2014-09-11 22:19:31.0' AND users.websiteurl = 'http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828' AND users.creationdate = '2010-07-20 12:52:54.0' AND posts.commentcount = 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE users.LastAccessDate = '2014-09-11 22:19:31.0'
  AND users.WebsiteUrl = 'http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828'
  AND users.CreationDate = '2010-07-20 12:52:54.0'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM posts
    WHERE posts.Score = 3
      AND posts.CommentCount = 0
      AND posts.LastEditorUserId = users.id
      AND posts.OwnerUserId = users.id
  )

records.question: Which users with an accountid exactly 449752 have related comments and have related votes with votetypeid exactly 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.accountid = 449752 AND votes.votetypeid = 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE users.AccountId = 449752
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM comments WHERE comments.UserId = users.Id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM votes WHERE votes.UserId = users.Id AND votes.VoteTypeId = 5
  )

records.question: Which users have a post history with the revisionguid exactly 33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
WHERE posthistory.revisionguid = '33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users

    SELECT 1
    FROM postHistory
    WHERE postHistory.UserId = users.Id
      AND postHistory.RevisionGUID = '33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df'
)

records.question: Which users named krio, with an account ID of at most 56158, created their accounts on or after 2011-04-12 14:05:29, have at least 101 reputation, at least 1 view, last accessed on 2011-04-17 13:16:41, and have votes of type exactly 5 created since 2011-04-12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.creationdate >= '2011-04-12 14:05:29.0' AND users.reputation >= 101 AND users.views >= 1 AND votes.votetypeid = 5 AND users.lastaccessdate = '2011-04-17 13:16:41.0' AND users.displayname = 'krio' AND users.accountid <= 56158 AND votes.creationdate >= '2011-04-12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE users.CreationDate >= '2011-04-12 14:05:29.0'
  AND users.Reputation >= 101
  AND users.Views >= 1
  AND users.LastAccessDate = '2011-04-17 13:16:41.0'
  AND users.DisplayName = 'krio'
  AND users.AccountId <= 56158
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM votes
    WHERE votes.UserId = users.Id
      AND votes.VoteTypeId = 5
      AND votes.CreationDate >= '2011-04-12'
  )

records.question: Who are the users named chl with no more than 214 downvotes who have earned badges and cast votes on or after August 21, 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN badges ON users.id = badges.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE votes.creationdate >= '2010-08-21' AND users.downvotes <= 214 AND users.displayname = 'chl'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE users.DownVotes <= 214
  AND users.DisplayName = 'chl'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM badges WHERE badges.UserId = users.Id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM votes WHERE votes.UserId = users.Id AND votes.CreationDate >= '2010-08-21'
  )

records.question: Which users have an account ID of at least 2607182, reputation of at least 13, no upvotes, no more than zero downvotes, and no more than one view, with creation date on or before 2013-04-08 14:47:21 and last access on or before 2013-04-10 13:28:13?

records.question: Who are the users with the display name exactly Pr0no that have made posts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
JOIN posts ON posthistory.postid = posts.id
WHERE users.displayname = 'Pr0no'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT users.id
FROM users
WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Pr0no'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM postHistory
    WHERE postHistory.UserId = users.Id
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM posts
        WHERE posts.Id = postHistory.PostId
      )
  )
